title: Fix Linked Metrics and Reports Not Visually Displaying
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see my linked metrics and analytics assets visually in the UI, so that I can verify and manage my metric-report associations.
description: After linking metrics and analytics assets, none of the linked assets are visually accessible in the UI. The linked reports and dashboards do not render on the metrics detail page.
acceptance_criteria: Linked reports and dashboards display correctly on the metrics detail view
All linked analytics assets are visually accessible after linking
ux_changes: Fixed rendering of linked metrics and analytics assets on the detail page.
middleware_changes: Fixed data retrieval for linked metric-report associations to properly populate the UI.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue and deployed to production for review.
